description: Address code review issues: onboarding wizard persistence, webhook error handling, realtime ticket auth, file upload documentation, auth SDK JSDoc, template tenant_count drift, and realtime subscribe documentation.
steps: Create app/api/tenant/onboarding/route.ts - POST endpoint that accepts {templateId, modules, companyName, pipelineName}, calls installTemplateModules, and creates a pipeline
Update app/tenant/onboarding/page.tsx - Add submit handler in step 3 that calls POST /api/tenant/onboarding
Update lib/sdk/webhooks.ts - Wrap each handler in try/catch, collect errors, return {acknowledged, event, errors} if any failed
Update lib/sdk/realtime.ts - Add getTicket() method, use ticket in SSE URL with fallback to token
Update lib/sdk/files.ts - Add contentEncoding to upload body, add uploadPresigned method, update types
Update lib/sdk/auth.ts - Add JSDoc explaining token isolation design
Update app/api/superadmin/templates/route.ts - Compute tenant_count dynamically from join
Update lib/sdk/realtime.ts - Add JSDoc to subscribe/unsubscribe explaining client-side filtering
Update SDK types and tests for new return types
acceptance_criteria: Onboarding wizard calls POST /api/tenant/onboarding on completion
WebhookRouter.handle() catches handler errors and returns them in response
RealtimeSDK.connect() uses a ticket by default with token fallback
FileSDK.upload includes contentEncoding field, uploadPresigned method exists
AuthSDK has JSDoc explaining its token isolation design
RealtimeSDK.subscribe has JSDoc explaining client-side filtering
findings: All 7 review issues addressed. TypeScript compiles with 0 errors. 397 tests pass (4 new). The 2 integration test failures are pre-existing (PostgreSQL ECONNREFUSED). RealtimeSDK.connect() is now async since it fetches a ticket first.
